untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'bearish MACD divergence' and 'second momentum peak has crested' — these are pattern-recognition concepts that require multi-bar lookback and peak/trough identification logic not expressible with the allowed indicators and operators. The condition 'prices have not already reached the correction level or profit target' also requires user-defined price levels not available in the indicator set. MACD crossover is translatable, but the divergence pattern detection cannot be mechanically expressed within constraints.
translation_notes: Translated the concrete MACD crossover entry signal (MACD line crosses signal line moving lower) as macd crosses_below macd_signal. Exit on MACD == 0 is literal from source. Bearish divergence recognition, second peak detection, and price target avoidance conditions are untranslatable without custom pattern-detection logic or user-defined parameters.
